fact.fact: Fixture-created agents are ordinary agents with non-unique display names and normal update/delete/editability lifecycle

source_refs.required_phrase: duplicate display names are allowed and are not auto-suffixed

downstreams.local_scope: fixture create keeps submitted duplicate names and reuses normal agent update/delete/editability behavior
renders display names without treating them as identity; uses agent_id and generated lifecycle calls
does not branch on fixture origin; assignment snapshots are keyed by agent_id
no Terraform diff unless a future fixture registry, media, search, durability, or evidence axis appears
